check_if_target_is_immersed_in_water.title: Check If Target Is Immersed In Water
check_if_target_is_immersed_in_water.description: Whether or not the target should be fully immersed in water for the knockback rules to apply.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filter.description:
Filter for the entity type that will be affected by these knockback rules.

Properties:
• domain (object)
• operator (object)
• subject (object)
• test (string)
• value (object)

horizontal_power.title: Horizontal Power
horizontal_power.description: Power with which a target should be knocked backwards.

vertical_power.title: Vertical Power
vertical_power.description: Power with which a target should be knocked upwards.

vertical_velocity_cap.title: Vertical Velocity Cap
vertical_velocity_cap.description: Maximum allowed Y velocity after target's knockback rules have been evaluated.
